productDisplayName: Fila Men Motor Sports Olive Sandals
description: Inspired by Motorsports and reinforcing the brand's style, passion and creativity that are deeply embedded in its genetic code, the fila Motor sports sandals is a great addition to your wardrobe.UpperSynthetic leather straps with velvet and gum rubber finish, and soft fabric inner lining for absolute comfortVelcro closure on the forefoot, and velcro with buckle closure on the midfoot strap to customise the FitTextured PU padded footbed with ergonomic grooves for absolute all-day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with multi-directional lugs for absolute grip and traction on various surfacesCurved midfoot for inner arch supportshoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
